title: angelica nakaiana
intro: Angelica nakaiana, also known as Japanese angelica or Kanzo in Japanese, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Angelica nakaiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving circulation, as well as its potential to inhibit the growth of certain types of cancer cells. Herbal preparations of Angelica nakaiana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
